title: MeowKit SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Permissive baseline schema. Calibrate against existing skills before tightening. Fields documented in meowkit/CLAUDE.md plus those observed in actual SKILL.md frontmatter.

name.description: Required. Must use mk: prefix and lowercase-kebab (meow: accepted as legacy alias; deprecated).

description.description: Required. Trigger description for the model. ≤1024 chars per Anthropic spec.

keywords.description: Optional. 5-15 lowercase-hyphenated discovery hints for catalog tooling. Not consumed by Claude Code routing (description carries that).

when_to_use.description: Optional. Human-readable trigger guidance. 1-2 sentences, third-person, includes 'NOT for ...' disambiguation when in confusion cluster. Overlaps content in description; editor responsibility to keep them in sync.

version.description: Optional. SemVer string preferred (e.g. '1.0.0') but number values (e.g. 2.0) tolerated for legacy skills.

source.description: Optional. Free-form provenance marker; observed values include 'meowkit', 'new', 'claudekit-engineer', 'agent-skills', 'gstack', 'aura-frog', 'antigravity-kit', 'microsoft/playwright', etc. Calibrated permissive 2026-04-29 — tighten later if a controlled vocabulary is established.

argument-hint.description: Optional. CLI-style usage hint shown to humans.

allowed-tools.description: Optional. Tools available to this skill. Array form preferred; comma-separated string accepted for backward compatibility.

triggers.description: Optional. Phrase triggers for skill activation.

actions.description: Optional. Sub-action names this skill exposes.

preamble-tier.description: Optional. Context-injection priority. 3 = high (preamble loaded first).

user-invocable.description: Optional. false = internal sub-skill not user-invokable.

phase.description: Optional. Workflow phase anchor (0..6 or on-demand).

trust_level.description: Optional. Provenance for injection-rules.md trust boundary.

autoInvoke.description: Optional. Documented in CLAUDE.md but not currently used in any SKILL.md frontmatter.

subagent_type.description: Optional. Observed in some agents (e.g., 'advisory'). Not formally documented.

owner.description: Optional (governance). Domain that owns this artifact. See harness-metadata-schema.json for enum values and heuristics.

criticality.description: Optional (governance). Impact of this artifact being incorrect or absent.

status.description: Optional (governance). Lifecycle state of this artifact.

runtime.description: Optional (governance). Execution environment required by this artifact.

context_cost.description: Optional (governance). Estimated token footprint when loaded into context. Top-level mirror of meowkit.context_cost; both forms are accepted.

depends_on.description: Optional (governance). Artifact IDs this skill depends on at runtime.
